text:
When I try to compile sysutils/openzfs with the PYTHON option enabled, I get packaging errors with it saying that the python scripts don't exist.

Full build log: https://poudriere.cyberbotx.com:8768/data/13amd64-default/2024-06-03_12h27m51s/logs/errors/openzfs-2023113000_1.log
